problem id: d2695f15
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  00001100 -> 00110000
  11101010 -> 00101011
  00010100 -> 01010000
  01011000 -> 01100001
  01010101 -> 00010101
  00101110 -> 00111000
  00011111 -> 10111100
  10000101 -> 01010110
  10001001 -> 01100110

query: 10001111
predicted answer: 11111110
